name: Paperless-GPT
description: Paperless-GPT seamlessly pairs with Paperless-ngx to generate AI-powered document titles, tags, correspondents, and custom fields. It supercharges OCR with LLMs for enhanced text extraction, supports multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Ollama, Google AI, Mistral, Anthropic), and features a web UI for manual review, batch processing, and customizable prompts via a Settings interface.
author: icereed

form_fields.label: Paperless-ngx Base URL
form_fields.hint: Base URL of your Paperless-ngx instance (e.g., http://localhost:8000)

form_fields.label: Paperless-ngx API Token
form_fields.hint: API token from your Paperless-ngx instance (Settings > API Tokens)

form_fields.label: LLM Provider
form_fields.hint: AI provider for document processing

form_fields.label: LLM Model
form_fields.hint: Model name for the selected provider (e.g., gpt-4o, qwen3:8b, gemini-2.0-flash)

form_fields.label: OpenAI API Key
form_fields.hint: API key for OpenAI (required if using OpenAI or compatible provider)

form_fields.label: OpenAI Base URL
form_fields.hint: Custom base URL for OpenAI API (for Azure OpenAI or compatible endpoints)

form_fields.label: OpenAI API Type
form_fields.hint: Set to 'azure' to use Azure OpenAI Service

form_fields.label: Mistral API Key
form_fields.hint: API key for Mistral (required if using Mistral provider)

form_fields.label: Ollama Host URL
form_fields.hint: URL of your Ollama instance (required if using Ollama provider)

form_fields.label: Ollama Context Length
form_fields.hint: Sets NumCtx (context window) for Ollama. 0 or empty uses model default

form_fields.label: Google AI API Key
form_fields.hint: API key for Google AI (required if using Google AI provider)

form_fields.label: Anthropic API Key
form_fields.hint: API key for Anthropic (required if using Anthropic provider)

form_fields.label: LLM Language
form_fields.hint: Language for AI-generated titles and tags (e.g., English, French, German)

form_fields.label: Vision LLM Provider
form_fields.hint: Provider for OCR vision processing (leave empty to use same as LLM Provider)

form_fields.label: Vision LLM Model
form_fields.hint: Model name for vision OCR processing (e.g., gpt-4o, llava)

form_fields.label: OCR Provider
form_fields.hint: OCR engine for document text extraction

form_fields.label: Token Limit
form_fields.hint: Maximum number of tokens sent to the LLM (0 = no limit)

form_fields.label: Paperless Public URL
form_fields.hint: Public URL for Paperless-ngx (if different from Base URL)

form_fields.label: Manual Processing Tag
form_fields.hint: Tag name for manual document processing

form_fields.label: Auto Processing Tag
form_fields.hint: Tag name for automatic document processing

form_fields.label: Auto OCR Tag
form_fields.hint: Tag name for automatic OCR processing

form_fields.label: OCR Process Mode
form_fields.hint: Method for processing documents for OCR

form_fields.label: OCR Page Limit
form_fields.hint: Limit the number of pages for OCR (0 = no limit)

form_fields.label: Skip Existing OCR
form_fields.hint: Skip OCR processing for PDFs that already have OCR

form_fields.label: Auto Generate Title
form_fields.hint: Generate titles automatically for auto-tagged documents

form_fields.label: Auto Generate Tags
form_fields.hint: Generate tags automatically for auto-tagged documents

form_fields.label: Auto Generate Correspondents
form_fields.hint: Generate correspondents automatically for auto-tagged documents

form_fields.label: Auto Generate Document Type
form_fields.hint: Generate document types automatically (uses existing types from paperless-ngx)

form_fields.label: Auto Generate Created Date
form_fields.hint: Generate created dates automatically for auto-tagged documents

form_fields.label: Log Level
form_fields.hint: Application log level

form_fields.label: Correspondent Black List
form_fields.hint: Comma-separated list of names to exclude from correspondent suggestions
